div.p: This Sparse Set implementation prioritizes Temporal Performance (O(1)) over Spatial Efficiency.

ul.li: Cache Boundary: Offset 0x00 represents a 64-byte cache line start.
Optimization: To reduce the 8MB overhead, consider a PageSparseSet (Chunked Sparse Array).
Current Length: 100 elements "- Target Access": sparse[999_999]
